content: Welcome to the BMN Lab. We develop advanced computational frameworks for Diffusion MRI and brain connectivity mapping.

content: We are thrilled to welcome Dulaj Dasanayake and Sumonta Nandy Amit to the Brain Mapping and NeuroImaging Lab as our newest Ph.D. students. They will be contributing to our research in computational neuroimaging and brain connectivity.
title: Dulaj and Sumonta have joined the BMN Lab
